reviews.review_description:
My official review is on strategyandwargaming dot net. Chris’s Top 2025 games. 

This game is an underground gem. Great for any rogue deck builder autobattler fan or table top strategy fan.

How is this game not more popular? It’s honestly some of the most fun I’ve had in VR. Well made, super polished, and the right blend of strategy and luck. Also really great world building and aesthetics. The lower reviews seem to be from people disappointed the game hasn’t received content updates rather than due to quality. I do agree with them it would be great if this game got more content but it’s still well worth it even as is now. 

Maybe if more people discover this hidden gem that will change. The devs really built something special.

reviews.review_title: game is fun but needs updates
reviews.review_description: if you enjoy these kind of strategy games this is a good one! The only issues are the devs haven’t dropped another update since launch i believe. That means the game is losing player base for the PVP aspect as well as no new features are being added. Hope to see the devs make some updates soon i really like this game

reviews.review_title: Ok game, no player base for PVP
reviews.review_description: Ok game but only about 4 hours worth of solo play..  Tried to play PVP, but no match found after several attempts with long waits but never any matches, glad it was on sale but still felt like i should have paid half, maybe a $10 dollar game at best.

reviews.review_title: Games fun, hard to find matches
reviews.review_description: This game is exactly what I was looking for.  It’s fun and looks good.  Not sure if I’m good or not but I have fun playing it.  Seems impossible to find matches.  I even joined discord to try and find people to play against.  I read on there that there’s no voice chat when you do play online which I can’t believe is real for a game that came out in 2025.  Maybe it’s been added but won’t know until I can find a match.

reviews.review_title: I love this I like this alot 🔥🔥🔥🔥🚒
reviews.review_description: I'm not a table top person .but this is the second game ever in my life I like . It's magical entertainment. Fun to learn and play this board is magical and it is calm  with beautiful victory themes.  Have you ever seen wind  on a board swirling it's magical.  Put this in your library.  .game is perfect but I crave to move my soilders around sometimes..  5 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐... It's a keeper ...get it !! In your life !!!!
The games fun but dose not get any updates Seinfeld release so its gotten repeditive

reviews.review_title: Best board game of all time BUT
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend are addicted to this game. We play a lot of vr games, and we only really like Demeo and Demeo battles for table top. This is such a simple yet complex, fun game. It's super engaging, easy, and super easy to get the hang of. The game just game out, so there's not too much content, but I only see that  as unlimited potential for the game because the game is a perfect 10 as it is. If the game gets regular updates, then this will be my favorite vr game of all time. It's already up there. I don't really write reviews for games, so that should be a testament to how good this game really is. Give this game the love it deserves! / This was my initial review, but I want to warn new players. If you do get this game, you won't be able to talk to any other players. There is no in-game mic, and the online community doesn't exist. You'll most likely que for hours not to find a game. Unless you have friends who can play with you, you won't really ever be playing online games. Even if you do find real players, there is no way to communicate with them or really socialize in any compacity. You can use 3rd party app to meet people to play, but even then, the few people that do play are from completely different countries to scheduling doesn't really work. Me and my friend have to call on our cell phones to be able to talk and play. This is my favorite board game of all time, but it's being held back immensely by a lack of community. You can't really build a community if you can't communicate. It may feel like you're playing against bots when you do find a game, but I assure you. There are no bots. Everyone is a real player. You legit just can't talk

reviews.review_title: Good - could be great with some fixes
reviews.review_description:
The game has a polished foundation. 
But it’s missing key things that would make it great. 

The good
1. Nice graphics. 
2. Decent world building story. 
3. Can play private matches with a friend 
4. factions have different deck playstyles. 

The bad
1. The solo campaign is like an extended tutorial. And as a tutorial, it’s great, but as an entire game, it’s too short.
2. The decks need more customizability. There aren’t enough different types of units and the max caps on each unit type means the practical variation from deck to deck for a given faction is pretty small
3. The factions are not well-balanced. Seems fine in the solo mode, but the second you do PvP, you see how one-sided and unbalanced it is. 
    * Ballistas are too powerful and have too many hit points. Other factions don’t have easy counters. The necros have unreliable Devine furies.  Shadowblades are easily countered by any other melee unit placed to guard the ballista. 
    * Protectors are too powerful.
    * So a real fight always comes down to illustan vs illustan, and that’s coming from someone who really liked the necros and the assassins. But they just can’t keep up with the illustans. 
4. The game will suffer from lack of player-base , but this is a problem for every multiplayer game. It’s fine if you always play with a friend in a private match. 
5. The avatar AIs/ guidance is really bad. The avatars often get confused and stand around doing nothing, or pace back and forth (doing nothing). 
6. There is too much mana late game and nowhere near enough card draw for it.  Games often come down to the luck of the draw in the final 2-3 turns. Am I going to draw gladiators or a ballista. 
7. The pyramid dice on your wrist that you grab to lock in your turn too easily triggers the whole table to move instead by mistake. Not great for motion sickness. 

Despite all the criticisms, these are things the developers could totally address. It’s a good game, just needs a few things to make it great.

It’s been great so far! I’m enjoying the difficulty with the missions for each objective and the immersion is nicely done. It would be great to have PvE for multiplayer as well so that I can test out my decks without needing to play against myself. I also think mixing up the music would be nice! 

I enjoy the linear progression and not needing to spend gold for cards. Rather, I simply play and level up to unlock more cards and troops. 

The strategy is engaging and a good change of pace. Overall, it’s like cards and tankards met Demeo and made a fun Warhammer inspired  tabletop vr game. 

Very happy with my purchase and look forward to what the game brings to the community!

I just made the purchase, played until my headset died and itching to get back in. I’m currently only playing the campaign mode learning what this game has to offer and I can feel that it’s much deeper than its introductory gameplay would lead you to believe. I will return to update my review and modify if need be  once I play through campaign and multiplayer but I can tell you confidently already to buy this game and I’ll see you on the battlefield.

Back again 5/18. I’m convinced that no one is playing this game I refuse to believe the leader board is legit.  I have yet been able to get a pvp game. The most I could tolerate waiting was 20 minutes and nothing.  I’m starting to think my game is glitched how can it be that I’ve tried at different times, mornings, mid afternoon and evening still nothing not a single player on. I want to keep my review at 5 stars because it’s not fair to use this against a game that is great to play even if it’s against myself.

You can burn thru the player vs computer fairly quickly. The game is fun but it's near impossible to get a pvp match. I set for 10 to 20 minutes without it ever bringing in another player. So be prepared for that. Maybe will be better in the future as more play it.

Vestiges: Fallen Tribes immediately hooked me with its gameplay. We find the classic management and strategy mechanics of board and card games, but transposed into virtual reality, which completely changes the experience.
With desert visuals blending ancient Egypt and futurism, holographic maps that float before your eyes, and an interface designed for VR.
Seeing your tribe come to life directly on the battlefield is impressive and immersive.
The clashes add a real rhythm and interesting depth.
Several game modes: solo campaign, or multiplayer against real players, sandbox, or even training mode that allows you to play both teams in turn to gradually learn the cards of the three tribes and win the water war.
And the big plus is being able to create your own decks to test against your friends!
The heart of the game is the placement phase: you choose your cards, deploy your units on the field according to their powers and the energy you possess. Then the battles are executed automatically.
You can zoom in and rotate the board to observe it from all angles.
For an independent production, Vestiges impresses with its promise and could become a benchmark in VR strategy.
A game to watch closely for all fans of immersive strategy

This game brings classic deck-building strategy into the immersive world of virtual reality — and it works really well. 

The game’s strategic depth is solid, with an approachable linear story mode and more challenging additional goals. 

The story is enticing, the visuals are clean and stylish. There are multiple battlefield maps allowing varying combat strategies.

Coming back to my original review to post about multiplayer mode. 

Since purchasing the game on release and finding opponents to match in PvP, I’ve now played several online battles and it is awesome. 

The cards and « base decks » are well balanced. I’ve also created my own deck and enjoyed playing my own strategies. I’ve collected my rewards and customised some of my character’s attributes.

Playings this turn-based game with real adversaries opened up new challenges and tactics. The time constraint for each play is fair and does create some tension.

I’ve been making mistakes from bad openers, time running out on me during a play, to strong/unexpected adversary moves but each round proofed to be a new challenge.

The play time value of this game on top of the solo/story mode is fantastic!

An overall great purchase, this is worth picking up.

I have just tried the game I cannot express how much I love it. 10/10 I definitely recommend it. 
The game's narrative, music, and maps remind me of Dune. As for the gameplay, there is a mix of warhammer, total war and demeo. I really like the solo/tactics section where they have a campaign and a part dedicated to teach you some of the tactics you can use in the game, it's a good way of getting the players to learn what are the factions' strongest units and features. Each faction has its pros and cons and they seem pretty balanced. I am honestly  still deciding which best suits me and I am so looking forward to see more tribes and maybe even some additional equipment that could be used as a card (walls, barriers, traps etc.). Once again, good job developers! I can't wait to see what you will implement in the future 👏

Super fun game! Very addicting if you enjoyed age of empires or starcraft. Reminds me a little of age of mythology with a twist. Anyway, great game! Can the devs PLEASE develop same type game either civil war or revolutionary war. PLEASE.

reviews.review_title: Tabletop strategy board game at its best
reviews.review_description: I was blown away by the depth of the strategy and the different decks and card types. Vestiges: Fallen Tribes is a lot of fun.

Big fan so far, worried it'll lack a little variety but that could improve over time. Find it to have enough strategy to be engaging but light enough to be relaxing to play. Mixed reality would be amazing, hopefully they'll add.

reviews.review_title: I can't stop playing this game !!!
reviews.review_description:
Fantastic Game I have to force myself to have a break. Just can't wait to put the headset back on for another round.
Well done, Devs 👏 . Hope more levels 🙏 in time.
Decided to get this game earlier and is such a refreshing game to play! Absolutely love it and can’t wait to see what the future holds for this game. Please get this game you won’t regret it!
